aboutParagraph1: I figure it out and make it happen.
aboutParagraph2: I've built products from scratch — from idea to deployed, solo. Full-stack, from database to UI. If it needs to exist and doesn't yet, I build it.
project1.title: Road Mates
project1.description: A peer network for people who grind alone. Declare what you're becoming — get matched with others at the same phase or ahead of you. Not social media. Something quieter and more useful.
project2.title: E-commerce
project2.description: A full-stack marketplace with multi-role access — admin, seller, buyer. Built to compete with the big ones.
project3.title: BOS
project3.description: A productivity OS. Organize goals, track habits, manage tasks — and actually become who you're trying to be.

Contact.title: Say hello.
Contact.infoText: If something I'm building resonates, or you just want to talk — I'm here.

form.name: Name
form.success: Your message has been sent successfully! I will get back to you soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
